narrative:
Precinct Pleasant West (precinct in Van Wert County) has 427 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.8 percentage points.
